channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Dozens killed as passenger bus falls into ravine in Zhob due to suspected brake failure
item.description: At least 40 people lost their lives and eight others were injured when a passenger bus plunged into a deep ravine in the Danasar area of Zhob, Balochistan. According to police and local officials, the...

item.title: Brent crude falls towards $70 amid easing Middle East tensions and inflation relief expectations
item.description: Global oil markets have continued to ease, with Brent crude slipping towards the $70 per barrel mark as geopolitical tensions in the Middle East show signs of easing. Diplomatic progress between the U...

item.title: Profile of late Tanimola linked to alleged phantom council appointment scandal
item.description: Dolapo Babatunde Tanimola, now deceased, has emerged as a central but mysterious figure in an alleged “phantom council” scandal being investigated by Nigerian authorities. According to reports referen...

item.title: Pasay City implements road closures and tight security ahead of Vice President Sara Duterte impeachment trial
item.description: Pasay City authorities have announced significant traffic rerouting and security preparations in anticipation of the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte, which is set to begin at the Sena...

item.title: Pegasus spyware used to target EU lawmaker involved in investigation into surveillance abuses
item.description: Security researchers have confirmed that a European politician involved in investigating spyware misuse was himself targeted and hacked using NSO Group’s Pegasus spyware. The case involves Stelios Kou...

item.title: Kenya Kwanza leaders rally in Eldoret to promote government achievements and 2027 re-election bid
item.description: Senior Kenya Kwanza leaders, led by National Assembly Speaker Moses Wetang'ula and Kikuyu MP Kimani Ichung'wah, held a major political rally in Eldoret, Uasin Gishu County, where they rallied support ...

item.title: Profile of Joey Heatherton, American Actress and Entertainer of the 1960s and 1970s
item.description: The article provides a brief retrospective on Joey Heatherton, an American actress, singer, and dancer who rose to prominence during the 1960s and 1970s. Born in 1944, Heatherton became widely recogni...

item.title: Passenger bus crash near Balochistan-KP border leaves 40 dead and 8 injured
item.description: A tragic road accident took place when a Peshawar-bound passenger bus fell into a deep ravine shortly after leaving the Dhanasar area of Sherani district in Balochistan and crossing into Dera Ismail K...

item.title: BAFM Forum 2026 Day 1: Africa Advances Capital Market Integration, Youth Investment Push, and Economic Growth Updates
item.description: The first day of the 13th Building African Financial Markets (BAFM) Forum 2026, hosted in Dar es Salaam by the Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange (DSE) under the African Securities Exchanges Association (AS...

item.title: Hydropower Reservoirs as Seasonal Energy Storage for a Renewable Grid
item.description: This article explores the role of Spain’s existing hydroelectric reservoirs as a form of large-scale, long-duration energy storage in a future renewable-based electricity system. It argues that, altho...

item.title: National government continues peace programs in Sulu despite its exclusion from BARMM
item.description: The Philippine national government has reaffirmed that Sulu remains a priority area for peacebuilding initiatives even after its exclusion from the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BAR...

item.title: England World Cup match prompts temporary extension of pub opening hours until 5am
item.description: Pubs in England and Wales will be permitted to remain open until 05:00 on Monday to allow football supporters to watch England’s World Cup knockout match against Mexico. The match, taking place in Mex...

item.title: Portugal reach last 16 after VAR decision; Spain advance and World Cup knockout updates continue
item.description: This live World Cup 2026 update covers major developments from the knockout stage as Portugal and Spain progress amid high drama and controversy. Portugal secured their place in the last 16 after a ti...

item.title: Vintage 1970s Photos Highlight Jerry Hall’s Rise as a Supermodel
item.description: This article presents a curated collection of 30 vintage photographs showcasing Jerry Hall during her rise to fame in the 1970s. Born in 1956, Hall emerged as one of the defining supermodels of the de...

item.title: Tesla introduces six-seater long-wheelbase Model Y L in the United States market
item.description: Tesla has recently launched a six-seater version of its popular Model Y SUV with an extended wheelbase, known as the Model Y L, in the United States. This move aims to increase demand for its electric...

item.title: Congress seeks Supreme Court-monitored inquiry into alleged irregularities in Ram Temple donation case
item.description: The Congress party has called for a Supreme Court-monitored investigation into allegations of embezzlement of donations made to the Ram Temple in Ayodhya. In a letter addressed to Prime Minister Naren...

item.title: Spring Strawberry, Burrata and Endive Salad Recipe with Herb Dressing
item.description: This feature presents a fresh seasonal salad recipe showcasing spring strawberries paired with creamy burrata cheese and crisp endive. Developed as part of the Simply Delicious series, the dish is dem...

item.title: Meru County to Explore Banana Stem-Based Organic Hair Production Amid Health and Environmental Claims
item.description: The Governor of Meru County, Isaac Mutuma M’Ethingia, has announced a new initiative aimed at producing organic hair using banana stems, a move he says will create jobs, support farmers, and reduce re...

item.title: Four Tanzanians awarded Mexico World Cup trips through Mixx digital payments campaign
item.description: Four Tanzanian citizens have been rewarded with all-expenses-paid trips to Mexico after emerging winners in a promotional campaign run by digital financial services provider Mixx. The winners—Sumaiya ...

item.title: Portugal edge Croatia in VAR-filled thriller to book World Cup last-16 clash with Spain
item.description: Portugal don secure their place in the World Cup round of 16 after a very tense 2-1 win over Croatia in a match full of drama and late twists. The game, played on Thursday, was tightly contested, with...
